# `supportR` - Support Functions for Wrangling and Visualization

![](reference/figures/supportR_hex.png)

`supportR` is an R package where the only unifying theme of the
functions is honestly just that I wrote them. That said, there are some
useful functions for **data wrangling**, **quality control** checks, and
**visualization** in particular, though functions for *other purposes*
are also included. Check out the package website
([njlyon0.github.io/supportR](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/)) for
documentation of the functions currently included in the package. I’ll
add functions to this package as I write more orphan scripts that I hope
others might find useful so stay tuned!

## Installation

You can install the development version from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("njlyon0/supportR")
```

## Looking Ahead

More functions are likely to be developed and housed within this package
so stay tuned! Feel free to check out [the contributing
guidelines](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/CONTRIBUTING.html) if you
want to know how to contribute directly to `supportR`.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`array_melt()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/array_melt.md)
  : Melt an Array into a Dataframe

- [`count()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/count.md) :
  Count Occurrences of Unique Vector Elements

- [`count_diff()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/count_diff.md)
  : Count Difference in Occurrences of Vector Elements

- [`crop_tri()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/crop_tri.md)
  : Crop a Triangle from Data Object

- [`date_check()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/date_check.md)
  : Check Columns for Non-Dates

- [`date_format_guess()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/date_format_guess.md)
  : Identify Probable Format for Ambiguous Date Formats

- [`diff_check()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/diff_check.md)
  : Compare Difference Between Two Vectors

- [`force_num()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/force_num.md)
  : Force Coerce to Numeric

- [`github_ls()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/github_ls.md)
  : List Objects in a GitHub Repository

- [`github_ls_single()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/github_ls_single.md)
  : List Objects in a Single Folder of a GitHub Repository

- [`github_tree()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/github_tree.md)
  : Create File Tree of a GitHub Repository

- [`name_vec()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/name_vec.md)
  : Create Named Vector

- [`nms_ord()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/nms_ord.md)
  **\[superseded\]** : Publication-Quality Non-metric Multi-dimensional
  Scaling (NMS) Ordinations

- [`num_check()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/num_check.md)
  : Check Columns for Non-Numbers

- [`ordination()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/ordination.md)
  : Create an Ordination with Ellipses for Groups

- [`pcoa_ord()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/pcoa_ord.md)
  **\[superseded\]** : Publication-Quality Principal Coordinates
  Analysis (PCoA) Ordinations

- [`replace_non_ascii()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/replace_non_ascii.md)
  : Replace Non-ASCII Characters with Comparable ASCII Characters

- [`rmd_export()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/rmd_export.md)
  : Knit an R Markdown File and Export to Google Drive

- [`safe_rename()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/safe_rename.md)
  : Safely Rename Columns in a Dataframe

- [`summary_table()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/summary_table.md)
  : Generate Summary Table for Supplied Response and Grouping Variables

- [`tabularize_md()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/tabularize_md.md)
  : Make a Markdown File into a Table

- [`theme_lyon()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/supportR/reference/theme_lyon.md)
  :

  Complete `ggplot2` Theme for Non-Data Aesthetics
